name: PAVmed Inc.
business: PAVmed is a diversified commercial-stage life sciences company operating in the medical device, diagnostics, and digital health sectors. It commercializes the EsoGuard Esophageal DNA Test and EsoCheck Esophageal Cell Collection Device through its subsidiary Lucid Diagnostics, and the Veris Cancer Care Platform through Veris Health. It also is developing a medical device portfolio including PortIO implantable intraosseous vascular access device and recently licensed endoscopic imaging technology from Duke University.
namedCustomers: The Ohio State University Comprehensive Cancer Center - The James

exposures.sentence: PAVmed is developing a medical device portfolio, including its PortIO implantable intraosseous vascular access device and recently licensed endoscopic imaging technology from Duke University.

Lucid's flagship product, the EsoGuard Esophageal DNA Test, performed on samples collected with the EsoCheck Esophageal Cell Collection Device, constitutes the first and only commercially available diagnostic test capable of serving as a widespread testing tool with the goal of preventing EAC deaths, through early detection of esophageal precancer in at-risk GERD patients.

Veris Health s lead product, the Veris Cancer Care Platform, is a comprehensive digital cancer care platform designed to support personalized cancer care during treatment and throughout survivorship by enabling continuous monitoring of patient health between visits.

catalysts.event: CAC meeting regarding LCD reconsideration for EsoGuard Medicare coverage
catalysts.sentence: As part of the LCD reconsideration process, MolDx-participating Medicare Administrative Contractors convened a Contractor Advisory Committee ("CAC") Meeting regarding the LCD on September 4, 2025.

In January 2026, Lucid announced that it has been awarded a contract by the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs for EsoGuard, expanding access to esophageal precancer testing across the nation's largest integrated healthcare system.

catalysts.event: Commercial phase of Veris partnership with OSUCCC The James
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced that Veris and The Ohio State University Comprehensive Cancer Center - The James Cancer Hospital and Solove Research Institute ("OSUCCC The James"), a National Cancer Institute-Designated Comprehensive Cancer Center, launched the commercial phase of their long-term strategic partnership agreement.
In March 2025, Lucid announced that a recent update to the NCCN Guidelines focused on Esophageal and Esophagogastric Junction Cancers (Version 1.2025) has added a new section on BE screening.

catalysts.event: Highmark Blue Cross Blue Shield positive coverage policy for EsoGuard
catalysts.sentence: On March 13, 2025, Lucid announced that Highmark Blue Cross Blue Shield, an independent licensee of the Blue Cross and Blue Shield Association, has issued a positive coverage policy for non-invasive screening of esophageal precancer and cancer in New York state.

catalysts.event: Lucid added to Russell 2000 and 3000 indexes
catalysts.sentence: On June 27, 2025, Lucid was added to the Russell 2000 Index and the Russell 3000 Index, following the 2025 annual reconstitution by FTSE Russell.

catalysts.event: Real-world experience data announced for EsoGuard
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, Lucid announced results from an 18-month real-world experience evaluating EsoGuard and EsoCheck in approximately 12,000 patients.

catalysts.event: Series D Preferred Stock Warrant callable upon MolDx draft LCD for EsoGuard
catalysts.sentence: Upon the publication by Molecular Diagnostic Services Program (MolDx) of a draft local coverage determination that EsoGuard will be covered by Medicare, the Series D Preferred Stock Warrant will be callable by the Company at a price of $0.001 per warrant share.

catalysts.event: Planned 510(k) submission for Veris implantable physiological monitor
catalysts.sentence: We plan to make our 510(k) submission for the implantable monitor, which could happen as early as late 2026, if and to the extent resources permit us to do so.

tamClaims.claim: EsoGuard total addressable U.S. market opportunity approximates $60 billion based on an effective Medicare payment of $1,938 and the estimated 30 million U.S. patients recommended for screening.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the sentence: "Accordingly, we believe EsoGuard s total addressable U.S. market opportunity approximates $60 billion based on an effective Medicare payment of $1,938 and the estimated 30 million U.S. patients recommended for screening by clinical practice guidelines."

tamClaims.claim: Veris Health total addressable U.S. market opportunity exceeds $2 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the sentence: "Based on the aforementioned cancer prevalence in the U.S. and our current business model, we believe Veris Health s total addressable U.S. market opportunity exceeds $2 billion."
